motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def maxTaskAssign(tasks, workers, pills, strength):
    n = len(tasks)
    m = len(workers)

    total_strength = 0
    max_tasks = 0

    for i in range(m):
        total_strength += workers[i]
        if total_strength >= tasks[i]:
            max_tasks += 1

    return max_tasks

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(m)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
